series_metadata.series_title: Ignition Interlock Device (IID) Licensee Investigation/Disciplinary Files
series_metadata.series_description: In accordance with rule 4501-45-05 of the Ohio Administrative Code, the Director of the Department of Public Safety may deny an application for licensure or certification filed by an IID manufacturer and may take disciplinary action against such license or certification. This record series contains all documents gathered as part of the administrative action process including: investigation into alleged violations; reports of investigations; recommendations for disciplinary action; and adjudication results.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: current, case is closed and all administrative remedies have been exhausted. Records are retained on network drives in Ohio Traffic Safety Office. ; Paper: current, case is closed and all administrative remedies have been exhausted. Records may be transferred DPS Record Center during retention period. Records may be imaged. If imaged, paper may be destroyed when electronic record is validated
